sqlMap.select: select v.id id, v.bengin_date bengin_date, v.end_date end_date, v.business_sendate business_sendate, v.secretary_sendate secretary_sendate, v.business_flag business_flag, v.secretary_flag secretary_flag from vm_fillreason_archives v where v.business_sendate <= sysdate and nvl(v.business_flag,'0') <> '1'

select v.id id, v.bengin_date bengin_date, v.end_date end_date, v.business_sendate business_sendate, v.secretary_sendate secretary_sendate, v.business_flag business_flag, v.secretary_flag secretary_flag from vm_fillreason_archives v where v.secretary_sendate <= sysdate and nvl(v.secretary_flag,'0') <> '1'

select v.id id, v.register_date register_date, v.register_period register_period, v.uphand_member business, v.depart depart, v.hand_state hand_state, v.unhand_season unhand_season, v.send_state send_state, v.comments comments from vm_unhandphone_archives v where v.unhand_season is null and v.register_date between trunc(#benginDate#) and #endDate# and v.hand_state = 2148475974818942065 and v.send_state = -4924790884161860057

select v.id id, v.register_date register_date, v.register_period register_period, v.uphand_member business, v.depart depart, v.hand_state hand_state, v.unhand_season unhand_season, v.send_state send_state from vm_unhandphone_archives v where v.unhand_season is null and v.register_date between #benginDate# and #endDate# and v.hand_state = 2148475974818942065 and v.send_state = -660051773175676407

select nvl(v.begindate,v.applytime) beginDate, v.enddate endDate, v.proposercode proposercode, v.evectiontype evectiontype from vm_evations v where nvl(v.begindate,v.applytime) <= #date# and v.enddate >= #date# and v.proposercode = #proposercode# and rownum = 1

select v.proposercode proposercode, v.begindate begindate, v.enddate enddate, v.beginPeriod beginPeriod, v.endPeriod endPeriod from vm_absence v where v.begindate is not null and v.enddate is not null and to_date(to_char(v.begindate,'yyyy-mm-dd') || decode(v.beginperiod,770469099444389055,'00:00:00','12:00:00'),'yyyy-mm-ddhh24:mi:ss') <= to_date(to_char(#date# ,'yyyy-mm-dd') || decode(#period#,-8856166350962081063,'09:00:00','13:00:00'),'yyyy-mm-ddhh24:mi:ss') and to_date(to_char(v.enddate,'yyyy-mm-dd') || decode(v.endperiod,770469099444389055,'12:00:00','23:59:00'),'yyyy-mm-ddhh24:mi:ss') >= to_date(to_char(#date# ,'yyyy-mm-dd') || decode(#period#,-8856166350962081063,'09:00:00','13:00:00'),'yyyy-mm-ddhh24:mi:ss') and v.proposercode = #proposercode# and rownum = 1
sqlMap.update: update vm_unhandphone_archives set unhand_season = #reason#,hand_state = 3725937545616052073 where id = #id#
update vm_unhandphone_archives set comments = #comments# where id = #id#
sqlMap.insert: insert into vm_fillreason_archives_son(id, formmain_id, sort,task_type,member,send_state)( select util_common.getAbsID, #id#, (select count(1) + 1 from vm_fillreason_archives_son where formmain_id = #id#), #taskEnumId#, #userId#, #sendEnumId# from dual)

insert into vm_unhandphone_archives( id,state,start_member_id,start_date,approve_member_id,approve_date, finishedflag,ratifyflag,ratify_member_id,update_member,update_date, register_date,register_period,uphand_member,depart, hand_state,date_sources, comments,send_state,hrid ) values ( #id#,1,-6760911671874597139,sysdate,0,sysdate, 0,0,0,-6760911671874597139,sysdate, #registerDate#,#registerPeriod#,#uphandMember#,#depart#, #handState#,-4757194022281916618, #comments#,-4924790884161860057,#hrId# )

insert into ctp_content_all (ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_DATE, MODULE_TYPE, MODULE_ID, MODULE_TEMPLATE_ID, CONTENT_TYPE, CONTENT, CONTENT_DATA_ID, CONTENT_TEMPLATE_ID, TITLE, SORT) values (util_common.getAbsID, '-6760911671874597139', sysdate, '', null, '37', #formId#, '-1192136872180628670', '20', '', #formId#, '8962213824091408148', '手机未交档案', '0')
sqlMap.select: select id from vm_fillreason_archives v where to_char(v.bengin_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#beginDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd') and to_char(v.end_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd')=to_char(#endDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd')
select count(1) from vm_unhandphone_archives where uphand_member = #uphandMember# and register_date = #registerDate# and register_period = #registerPeriod#
select count(1) from formmain_3592 where field0003 = #userId#
select field0003 from formmain_3592
select field0003 AS USERID,field0005 O32ID from formmain_3592
sqlMap.update: delete from vm_fillreason_archives_son where formmain_id = #id# and member is null
update vm_fillreason_archives set business_flag = '1' where id = #id#
update vm_fillreason_archives set secretary_flag = '1',secretary_sendate=sysdate where id = #id#
update vm_fillreason_archives set secretary_sendate = #secretarySendate# where id = #id#
sqlMap.select: select field0004 from formmain_3593 where field0003 = #depart#
select * from vm_member v, org_principal p where v.userid = p.member_id and v.hrId = #hrId#

select 'select o.str_state as manipulate, CONVERT(nvarchar(30), o.str_date,101) registerDate, CONVERT(nvarchar(30), o.str_date,120) date, case when convert(int, replace(convert(char(8), o.str_date, 108), ' || ''':''' || ','''')) between 080000 and 113000 and convert(int, replace(convert(char(8), o.str_date, 108), ' || ''':''' || ', '''')) != 113000 then' || '''AM''' || ' when convert(int,replace(convert(char(8), o.str_date, 108), ' || ''':''' || ', '''')) between 113000 and 160000 then ' || '''PM''' || ' else '''' end registerPeriod, k.keys hrId, u.userreason as reason from [sjg].[dbo].[lz_openlog] o left join [sjg].[dbo].[lz_keys] k on o.Str_CardNo = k.keys left join [sjg].[dbo].[lz_usertakekey] u on u.userid = o.Str_CardNo and u.date_time between DATEADD(MINUTE,-3,o.str_date) and DATEADD(MINUTE,3,o.str_date) where k.keys is not null and k.keys != ' || '''0''' || ' and o.str_date between convert(datetime,' || '''_strBeginDate_''' || ' ,101) and convert(datetime, ' || '''_strEndDate_''' || ' ,101) and cast(DATEPART(HOUR,o.str_date) as int) between 8 and 16 order by o.str_lockn,o.str_date ' from dual
select util_common.isWorkDay(#date#) from dual
select id from formmain_3595 f where trunc(f.start_date) between trunc( #monday#) and trunc( #friday#) and f.finishedflag = 0
sqlMap.update:
update wf_businesswritereason set note = note || '超过规定期限未填写，由OA系统自动终止流程,终止时间' || to_char(sysdate,'yyyy-mm-dd') WHERE id IN
#formIds[]#
sqlMap.insert: insert into vm_ResearcherHandlePhoneInfo (id, state, start_member_id, start_date, approve_member_id, approve_date, finishedflag, ratifyflag, ratify_member_id, ratify_date, login_name, depart_name, km_id, phone_hand_date, userId) values( util_common.getAbsID, #state#, #start_member_id#, #start_date#, #approve_member_id#, #approve_date#, #finishedflag#, #ratifyflag#, #ratify_member_id#, #ratify_date#, #login_name#, #depart_name#, #km_id#, to_date(#phone_hand_date#, 'yyyymmdd'), util_user.getMemIdByMemCode(#km_id#))
sqlMap.select: select to_char(phone_hand_date, 'yyyymmdd') || login_name from vm_ResearcherHandlePhoneInfo where to_char(phone_hand_date, 'yyyymmdd') between #startdate# and #enddate#
select field0003 memberId, field0006 isResearcher from formmain_3592

select (userId || to_char(phone_hand_date, 'MM/dd/yyyy')) as memberDate from vm_ResearcherHandlePhoneInfo where to_char(phone_hand_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') between to_char(#beginDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd') and to_char(#endDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd')

select distinct 'CL_FillInReason_T001' flowType, to_char(#beginDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd') || to_char(#endDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd') || uphand_member flowId, h.secretary writer, '14000' sendUserNo, v.depart depart, to_char(sysdate, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') sendDate, to_char(#beginDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd') bengin_date, to_char(#endDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd') end_date, v.uphand_member business from vm_unhandphone_archives v left join handPhoneSecretaryConfig h on v.depart = h.depart where v.unhand_season is null and v.register_date between #beginDate# and #endDate# and v.hand_state = 2148475974818942065 and v.unhand_season is null and v.uphand_member not in (select f.business from vm_fillreason_phone f where to_char(f.bengin_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#beginDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd') and to_char(f.end_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#endDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd') and f.business is not null)
select id, registerDate, userId, hrId, mornSubState, mornNonSubReason, afterSubState, afterNonSubReason from vm_cap4_phoneAndTradingRecord where userId = #userId#
select id, registerPeriod, manipulate, phoneCabineDate, reason from vm_cap4_phoneCabinetSonRecord where formmain_id = #formmain_id#
select id, registerPeriod, referType, o32IdOrLoginName, name, isOperationLog, lastRecordDate, platformStatus from vm_cap4_tradingSystemSonRecord where formmain_id = #formmain_id#
sqlMap.insert: insert into vm_cap4_phoneAndTradingRecord( ID, STATE, START_MEMBER_ID, START_DATE, APPROVE_MEMBER_ID, APPROVE_DATE, FINISHEDFLAG, RATIFYFLAG, RATIFY_MEMBER_ID, RATIFY_DATE, SORT, MODIFY_MEMBER_ID, MODIFY_DATE, registerDate, userId, hrId, mornSubState, mornNonSubReason, afterSubState, afterNonSubReason ) VALUES( #id#, 1, null, sysdate, null, sysdate, 0, 0, 0, sysdate, 0, null, sysdate, to_date(#registerDate#,'yyyy-MM-dd'), #userId#, #hrId#, #mornSubState#, #mornNonSubReason#, #afterSubState#, #afterNonSubReason# )
sqlMap.update: update vm_cap4_phoneAndTradingRecord set hrId = #hrId#, mornSubState = #mornSubState#, mornNonSubReason = #mornNonSubReason#, afterSubState = #afterSubState#, afterNonSubReason = #afterNonSubReason# where id = #id#
sqlMap.insert: insert into vm_cap4_phoneCabinetSonRecord values(util_common.getAbsID, #formmain_id#, #registerPeriod#, #manipulate#, to_date(#phoneCabineDate#,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), #reason#)

insert into vm_cap4_tradingSystemSonRecord values(util_common.getAbsID, #formmain_id#, #registerPeriod#, #referType#, #o32IdOrLoginName#, #name#, #isOperationLog#, to_date(#lastRecordDate#,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), #platformStatus#)
sqlMap.select: select id from vm_cap4_phoneAndTradingRecord where to_char(registerDate, 'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#registerDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd')
sqlMap.delete: delete from vm_unhandphone_archives where uphand_member = #uphandMember# and register_date = #registerDate# and register_period = #registerPeriod#
sqlMap.update: update vm_cap4_phoneAndTradingRecord set mornNonSubReason = #mornNonSubReason# where to_char(registerDate, 'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#registerDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd') and userId = #userId#
update vm_cap4_phoneAndTradingRecord set afterNonSubReason = #afterNonSubReason# where to_char(registerDate, 'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#registerDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd') and userId = #userId#

update vm_cap4_phoneAndTradingRecord set mornNonSubCause = #mornNonSubCause#, mornSubState = 3725937545616052073 where to_char(registerDate, 'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#registerDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd') and userId = #userId#

update vm_cap4_phoneAndTradingRecord set afterSubCause = #afterSubCause#, afterSubState = 3725937545616052073 where to_char(registerDate, 'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#registerDate#, 'yyyy-mm-dd') and userId = #userId#

insert into vm_writereason_phone_son (id, formmain_id, sort, register_date, register_period, comments) values(util_common.getAbsID, #formmain_id#,(select count(1) + 1 from vm_writereason_phone_son vws where vws.formmain_id = #formmain_id#), to_date(#register_date#,'yyyy-MM-dd'), #register_period#, #comments#)
update vm_unhandphone_archives set send_state = #send_state# where id = #id#
